ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the school */,
  "fsa" TEXT /* Forward sortation area (FSA) of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main email address for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal of the school */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school belongs to */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the board the school belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional office the school belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES school_boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_principal_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_id") REFERENCES school_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES school_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES regional_offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school district */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the district */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main email address for the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the district */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the school board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school board */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the board */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the board */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main email address for the board */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the board */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional office */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regional office */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main email address for the office */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the office */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., teacher, principal) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Specific position or title of the staff member */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent or guardian of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the facility belongs to */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility (e.g., number of seats in a classroom) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., classroom, gym, library) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, parent) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
